result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d eliminate the artificial scarcity that leaves billions without their basic needs. I’d work toward a reality where everyone—regardless of where they’re born—has reliable access to nutritious food, clean water, quality healthcare, and a good education. In a world where those fundamentals are guaranteed, many of the inequalities, conflicts, and human‑rights abuses that plague us today would lose their grip, and people could focus on flourishing, creating, and caring for one another.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I’d eliminate the artificial scarcity that leaves billions without their basic needs. I’d work toward a reality where everyone—regardless of where they’re born—has reliable access to nutritious food, clean water, quality healthcare, and a good education. In a world where those fundamentals are guaranteed, many of the inequalities, conflicts, and human‑rights abuses that plague us today would lose their grip, and people could focus on flourishing, creating, and caring for one another.
